themeWords.meaning: to trust, be confident, be secure
Zion; the hill in Jerusalem; figuratively the place of God's presence

sentenceTheme: Those who trust in the LORD are immovable like Mount Zion; He surrounds His people, restrains the wicked, rewards the upright, and grants peace to Israel.

verses.text: They that trust in the LORD shall be as mount Zion, which cannot be removed, but abideth for ever.

highlightedWords.meaning: to trust, be confident, be secure
Zion; the hill in Jerusalem; figuratively the place of God's presence

verses.text: As the mountains are round about Jerusalem, so the LORD is round about his people from henceforth even for ever.

highlightedWords.meaning: Jerusalem, the chief city and capital
the proper name of the God of Israel

verses.text: For the rod of the wicked shall not rest upon the lot of the righteous; lest the righteous put forth their hands unto iniquity.
Do good, O LORD, unto those that be good, and to them that are upright in their hearts.

highlightedWords.meaning: the proper name of the God of Israel

verses.text: As for such as turn aside unto their crooked ways, the LORD shall lead them forth with the workers of iniquity: but peace shall be upon Israel.

highlightedWords.meaning: Israel; the nation and people descended from Jacob
